title: join_strings should skip None and empty-string values
body:
join_strings() in radicli/util.py joins optional strings. Currently passing None values causes "None" to appear in the output.



Expected: "hello world" — None values should be filtered before joining.
Fix: filter out None and empty strings in join_strings() before the join call.
Add a test in radicli/tests/test_util.py covering None, empty string, and mixed inputs.
